source_rationale: KRT7 is a cytokeratin marking simple/glandular epithelial cells, strongly upregulated here
KRT19 is a luminal epithelial marker characteristic of ductal/secretory epithelium
KRT17 marks basal/myoepithelial cells and is associated with progenitor epithelial states

CDH1 (E-cadherin) is a hallmark of epithelial cell identity and cell-cell adhesion
MMP7 is expressed by epithelial cells particularly in glandular/ductal tissues
TP63 is a transcription factor marking basal epithelial/progenitor cells
TACSTD2 (TROP2) is an epithelial surface marker highly expressed in carcinomas and progenitor epithelium
GPRC5A is a retinoic acid-induced receptor enriched in lung epithelial cells
CLDN4 is a tight junction protein characteristic of epithelial barrier cells
MHC class II gene highly expressed in professional antigen-presenting cells
MHC class II alpha chain essential for antigen presentation by dendritic cells

MHC class II gene marking professional antigen-presenting cells
